authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(135) — Silver Creek (Mono Co.)
sources.quotedText: (135) Silver Creek (Mono Co.), tributary to West Walker River, and tributaries upstream from Silver Falls. Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: Visit Mono County — West Walker River
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams (Mouth) layer record for gaz_id 267247, "Silver Creek", Stream, Mono Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":267247,"gaz_name":"Silver Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Mono","objectid_1":1404118}; geometry multipoint, first point (Web Mercator -13303657.8181, 4629764.9209) converts to lon -119.508792, lat 38.355475, matching this creek's confluence with the West Walker River confirmed via OSM hydrography (downstream end of the mapped Silver Creek waterway at ~38.3554°N 119.5072°W, ~140m away); corrects prior file coordinates (-119.6120, 38.3550), which sat ~4.3km from this creek's own headwaters (GNIS second multipoint vertex, -119.609351, 38.394084, also confirmed via OSM as the mapped stream's upstream end) and ~9km from the correct GNIS mouth point.

parameters.note: Covers Silver Creek (a tributary to the West Walker River) and its own tributaries upstream from Silver Falls.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year on Silver Creek and its tributaries upstream from Silver Falls
regulations.verbatimText: Silver Creek (Mono Co.), tributary to West Walker River, and tributaries upstream from Silver Falls. Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
